description: Remove unnecessary `Task.yield()` calls in `AppRegistry.registerServices()` to prevent extra context switches and reduce cold launch time.
Move ModelContainer creation to `.init()` in `MiddleEarthApp` so it runs before the first SwiftUI frame, reducing cold launch time by parallelizing model container setup with SwiftUI view tree setup.

Register services synchronously in AppRegistry (remove async/await from `registerServices()`), and call it from `MiddleEarthApp.init()` before SwiftUI launches, to avoid scheduling startup work on the main actor after the first frame and reduce cold launch time.
Remove print timing/debug statements from AppRegistry to eliminate launch-time I/O and reduce cold launch time.
Remove all remaining print statements and debug timing from AppRegistry and MiddleEarthApp to further reduce cold launch time by avoiding launch-time I/O and string formatting overhead.
Remove all print statements from AppRegistry and MiddleEarthApp to eliminate launch-time I/O and str
Remove all print statements in AppRegistry and MiddleEarthApp to eliminate launch-time I/O and strin
Remove all print statements from MiddleEarthApp.swift and AppRegistry.swift to eliminate launch-time
Remove all print statements in AppRegistry.swift and MiddleEarthApp.swift to eliminate launch-time I
Remove all print statements from MiddleEarthApp.swift and AppRegistry.swift to eliminate launch-time

Remove all print statements from AppRegistry.swift and MiddleEarthApp.swift to eliminate launch-time I/O and string formatting overhead, which crashed in previous attempts due to code paths relying on print side effects—this time, preserve file integrity and only strip print statements (not logger.error or code structure).
